data.headline: {context:titleHeader}
data.text: {context:titleFooter}{context:description}

data.headline: ZONA msx
data.text: MSX версия приложения ZONA. Просмотр различного медиаконтента: фильмов, сериалов, аниме

data.headline: LAMPA
data.text: Catalog app. Transforms into an online cinema with torrent and IPTV support.

data.headline: LAMPA land
data.text: Lampa mod. Pre-configured for online viewing and IPTV.

data.headline: Lampset (Lampa Bundle)
data.text: LAMPA with alternative addresses. Use cub.red to save/transfer settings so you don't have to reconfigure.

data.headline: Lampa UnCensored
data.text: Lampa mod with plugin store and extras.

data.headline: Akter Black
data.text: Lampa mod. In development - some features unavailable. Preview only.

data.headline: Prisma TV
data.text: Lampa mod. In development - some features unavailable. Preview only.

data.headline: LAMPA NoName
data.text: Pre-configured for online viewing. Thanks to NoName.

data.headline: Lampa lite {col:yellow}|{col} NoName
data.text: Lampa Lite ready-to-use. Thanks to NoName.

data.headline: Lampa-UspehTV
data.text: Lampa mod with free IPTV and online plugins. Token required from Telegram bot: https://t.me/UspehTVBot

data.headline: Lampa by Skaz
data.text: Lampa with pre-installed online plugins. Add more from the store.

data.headline: NetFix
data.text: NetFix - Lampa-based app for movies/series. No setup needed. No torrents.{br}IMPORTANT: Paid subscription required. Trial available.

data.headline: VoKINO
data.text: App for movies, series, anime, and torrents.

data.headline: ATODO
data.text: App for movies, series, anime, and torrents.

data.headline: ATODO-web
data.text: Web версия приложения ATODO. Просмотр различного медиаконтента: фильмов, сериалов, аниме, а так же просмотр торрентов

data.headline: TVOЁ
data.text: Paid online cinema. Registration required. Trial period.{br}In development - may be unstable. Preview release.

data.headline: MOVIELAB
data.text: MOVIELAB portal on Media Station X. Online video content.

data.headline: Forkplayer
data.text: Smart TV web browser with auto-updating playlists. Watch movies, TV, listen to music and radio.

data.headline: Filmix Smart
data.text: Online cinema. Movies, cartoons, series in high quality.{br}{col:gold}VIP/PRO account required.

data.headline: KINOPOISK (WebOS)
data.text: Online cinema via Yandex Plus subscription or pay-per-view.

data.headline: KinoPUB
data.text: App for movies, series, anime. Registration and subscription required.

data.headline: Kinopub_sdnSL
data.text: App for movies, series, anime. Registration and subscription required.{br}If previous failed, try this one.

data.headline: X-SMART TV
data.text: XSMART digital media platform - catalog of movies, series, actors, directors. From open sources, informational purposes.

data.headline: DEEPLEX
data.text: App for movies, series, anime, and torrents.

data.headline: IMPIRE BOOM
data.text: EmpireBOOM - organized links to media: movies, series, cartoons, IPTV, radio, etc.

data.headline: KINOBOOM
data.text: Video from multiple sources. Search movies, series, cartoons, anime, TV shows. Quality select. KBC channels. VIP for 3 devices.

data.headline: GetsTV
data.text: Movies and cartoons. Largest database, updated daily, new releases after cinema premiere.

data.headline: Tutkino
data.text: Online cinema (vPlay mod). Access via donation.

data.headline: Tutkino Lite
data.text: Online cinema (Lampa Lite mod). Access via donation.

data.headline: KION
data.text: WebOS only. Subscription required.{br}Original series, 1000s of movies, 180+ TV channels. 5 devices, recommendations, kids profile.

data.headline: OKKO
data.text: WebOS only. Subscription required.{br}Movies, series, cartoons, TV channels, sports. Daily updates, new releases & classics.
